rules: Use 'JetBrains Mono' for all headings and major UI labels to enforce the 'Developer Tool' aesthetic.
Use 'Inter' for long-form text, documentation, and chat messages for readability.
Use 'Fira Code' strictly for the code editor and code snippets.
Overlines/Labels must be Uppercase + Tiny + Wide Spacing ('tracking-[0.2em]').
Primary color (#8b5cf6 - Violet) is reserved for AI interactions and primary CTAs.
Accent color (#10b981 - Emerald) is used for 'Run Code', 'Success', and 'Online' states.
Destructive color (#ef4444 - Red) is used for 'Stop Execution', 'Delete', and 'Errors'.
Backgrounds must be deep zinc/black (#09090b), NOT pure black (#000000).
Borders should be subtle (#27272a) to define structure without clutter.

spacing.dense: Tight spacing (p-2, gap-2) for toolbars and file trees.

structure: Main Layout: Split-pane architecture (Sidebar | Editor | Chat | Terminal).
Editor: Central focus, takes remaining width.
Chat Panel: Right side, collapsible, width 300px-400px.

custom_components.name: CodeEditor
custom_components.description: Wrapper around Monaco Editor or CodeMirror. Must support syntax highlighting and line numbers.

custom_components.name: TerminalPanel
custom_components.description: Output display with monospace font. Supports ANSI color codes.
custom_components.style: Darker background (#000000 or #121212), distinct from editor.

custom_components.name: AIChatInterface
custom_components.description: Chat bubble interface. User messages right aligned, AI messages left aligned.
custom_components.style: Glassmorphism header, clean input area at bottom.

styling_rules: Buttons: Sharp edges or small radius (rounded-md). No pill shapes for toolbars.
Inputs: Minimalist, 'border-b' only or subtle outline.
Cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border, no shadow by default. Hover: Slight lift.

assets.icons: Lucide React (default), Phosphor Icons (for specific tech icons)

images.description: Abstract AI Network Dark Background for Login/Landing
Subtle dark texture for modal backdrops
Cyberpunk coding setup for Hero section

animations: Fade in for new chat messages.

universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: 'transition: all'. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add '.App { text-align: center; }' in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed.
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones.
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...).
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...}).
Use 'sonner' for toasts. Sonner component are located in '/app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx'.
